items.desc: StandardX builds the world’s first isotope refinery, a proprietary machine that produces isotopes across the full portfolio at scale and closer to where they’re needed than existing infrastructure.

Demi is a proactive AI assistant that works natively inside Slack, connecting to a team’s existing tools to triage inboxes, compile reports, prepare briefs, and send follow-ups autonomously, with user-defined rules for what it handles on its own.
Ahoy is an AI-native CRM for founder-led sales teams that connects to a founder’s existing workflow to draft follow-ups, assemble meeting briefs, and keep pipelines current automatically.
Shiraz AI is an early-stage robotics and AI company based in the United States; further product details have not yet been publicly disclosed.

Tracemill verifies that production SIEM detections actually fire, injecting schema-faithful synthetic events into the security pipeline and returning per-rule verdicts that localize failures to the ingest or detection layer.
Building AI-native products for professional creatives.
Whistle Robotics makes automation accessible to small and medium-sized manufacturers by building intelligent, task-specific robots that deploy quickly, starting with CNC machine tending.

JoyWork helps field service and facilities companies get paid faster, running accounts receivable collection end-to-end with AI agents that prioritize accounts, handle outreach, and escalate to a human only when it counts.
Queue is the world’s first fully autonomous robotic pharmacy, taking sealed wholesale bottles to filled, verified prescription vials with zero human involvement.
Eccentric Machines is rearchitecting robotic motion and control with a new actuator architecture built for next-generation robotics and embodied AI.

Pisama is the missing layer between AI agent observability and incident response, using 57 purpose-built detectors to catch and resolve multi-agent failures like loop detection, state corruption, and persona drift at near-zero cost per trace.
Orvixo gives manufacturers a live view of their factory, with AI that monitors, acts, and optimises production in real time.
Kailo is simplifying training for all athletes.
RevDesk is a GTM agent platform that engages, qualifies, and closes buyers across voice, chat, and email.

Impact Drones is building an interceptor-in-a-box defense platform that deploys multiple autonomous interceptors on demand to protect critical infrastructure — energy grids, airports, data centers — and military assets.

Otis Labs builds sensors integrated into milking stations that detect udder-specific infection in real time, replacing periodic culture testing with per-milking telemetry. When a cow is flagged, an ear-tag device delivers targeted vagal nerve stimulation to re

Exona Lab builds predictive modelling and data infrastructure that helps insurers assess AI risk. Its Risk Engine ingests technical, operational, and compliance signals from AI systems to generate risk insights that guide underwriting and risk management decis

items.hq: San Francisco Bay Area, United States

items.desc: Building an AI-native platform for financial operations.
Atlas Discovery builds foundation models of patient drug response, trained on pre-clinical and clinical data, to predict human response to drugs before clinical trials.

Providio AI is an AI platform for managing enterprise revenue decisions, unifying cross-functional signals and executing coordinated actions with a human in the loop. It is currently live with a U.S. airline.

Sparkle Security is an AI-first SDLC platform that brings security into the product lifecycle from initial design through the final line of code, aiming to reduce AI-generated vulnerabilities and speed up design reviews.
Youngr Labs is a Paris-based AI Virtual Cell Lab transforming the scale and safety of longevity therapeutic discovery to help more people live healthier, longer.

Benchmark AI is a business intelligence platform built for college athletics, aggregating and structuring operational and financial data from athletic departments so administrators can benchmark against peers.
items.hq: South Bend-Mishawaka Region, Indiana, United States

items.desc: Verapulse builds the intelligence layer for embodied AI, developing efficient models that run real-time control directly on a robot’s existing hardware.

Neuron Industries builds industrial control systems that pair rugged hardware with modern software, engineered together as a single platform for the machines and processes behind manufacturing. The company is replacing today’s fragmented, multi-vendor automati
Sensate Robotics is building the sense of touch for robots, applying tactile sensing across produce handling, aerospace, defense, and manufacturing.
XDOF builds the infrastructure, tools, and data services that robotics companies use to accelerate physical AI development.

Cursive is building foundation models and generative infrastructure for software that is dynamic, interactive, and contextual, aiming to deliver instant, high-quality generative experiences embedded across applications.

DeepGate is pushing the frontier of energy-efficient machine learning at the edge, building compact, capable AI models for edge CPUs and embedded accelerators across smart cameras, audio devices, wearables, and robotics & drones.
Athon AI is an all-in-one platform for behavioral health clinics that reduces therapy notes, clinical insights, and compliance work from hours to minutes.
items.industry: Behavioral Health Tech, Clinical Documentation AI

items.desc: Clario helps enterprises identify and address Data Rot — the redundant, obsolete, and trivial information that accumulates across file shares, collaboration platforms, cloud storage, and legacy systems — so teams can reduce risk, control costs, and build AI in

Whitespace is an AI operating system for wholesale distributors that connects to a business’s existing systems and inboxes to build a living model of its operations, then deploys self-improving agents to automate work like inventory planning, customer support,
Sublime Nuclear is modernizing and modularizing the nuclear fuel conversion process to secure the domestic nuclear fuel supply chain.
Gutgutgoose is a personalized microbiome company that sequences gut DNA to predict which probiotic strains will actually colonize, rather than offering one-size-fits-all formulas.

Infera converts plain-English experiment descriptions into validated, instrument-ready protocols for existing lab equipment, handling vendor scripts, data, inventory, and institutional knowledge along the way.
Magic Blocks gives integrators and OEM sales teams a single place to search, spec, and shortlist products, powered by AI that understands how automation systems are built.
items.hq: New York, New York, United States

items.desc: Botanu is a business performance layer for enterprise AI agent workforces, connecting AI spend across model vendors, tools, and platforms to measurable business outcomes — giving finance and business leaders a single view of agent ROI within their own security
items.industry: Enterprise AI, AI Governance, B2B SaaS

items.desc: Replicater Labs is a life sciences research company focused on discovering and characterizing microbial dark matter.

TAR is a green energy infrastructure company building modular, plug-and-play power systems — combining solar, wind, battery storage, and gas backup — to provide on-site 24/7 power for AI-era data centers, bypassing grid connection delays.
items.industry: Energy Infrastructure, CleanTech, Data Center Infrastructure

items.desc: Taste Labs is building the data and infrastructure layer for aesthetic intelligence in AI, working with frontier labs on post-training data, RL environments, and evals, and with agent-layer companies on context and verification tools for design.
items.industry: Artificial Intelligence, AI Infrastructure, Creative Tech

items.desc: Sephra is building operating infrastructure for next-generation maritime companies.
items.industry: Maritime Tech, B2B SaaS, Artificial Intelligence

items.desc: SportsCapital is a trading firm and liquidity provider for prediction markets. They deploy trading strategies that bring price stability and order book depth to player props and parlays.
